title: Supply Chain Manager - Evergreen India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Evergreen India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!
